name: FirstFarms A/S
summary: FirstFarms A/S, through its subsidiaries, engages in the agriculture and food products business in Eastern Europe. It is involved in the cow milk production and pig production business; and operation of owned and rented agricultural land. The company also produces crops, such as wheat, maize, rape seed, barley, rye, sugar beets, poppies, pumpkins, soya, and sunflower. FirstFarms A/S was founded in 2004 and is headquartered in Billund, Denmark.
